description: MCP server configuration. This file can be committed to share MCP servers with your team.

gitnexus.name: gitnexus
gitnexus.description: Code Explorer (gitnexus) — optional proprietary add-on. Graph-powered code intelligence: query, impact/blast-radius, callers, hotspots, complexity over a pre-indexed knowledge graph. Run `gitnexus analyze .` once, then the agent asks the graph instead of reading dozens of files. https://github.com/phuetz/code-explorer
